Author: XeldarAlz
Name: Doman Mahjong Solver
Punchline: Doman Mahjong helper — hints or auto-play.
Description:
A helper for Doman Mahjong at the Gold Saucer. Two modes:

• Hint mode (default): shows the best tile to discard and a short explanation. You still click every move.
• Auto-play: the plugin watches the table and clicks for you with natural pacing.

Starts off by default. You must accept a short notice before auto-play can be turned on, and you can switch back to hints or turn it off at any time from the plugin window.
Changelog: v0.0.0.17 — second follow-up to #22: the Riichi popup is an AtkComponentList widget whose click pipeline runs through the list's own CallBackInterface, so the previous FireCallback-only dispatch only played the declaration animation without committing state (auto-play spammed riichi-confirm every few seconds). Dispatches now route through AtkComponentList.SelectItem for state-6/28 list popups while preserving FireCallback for classic state-15 pon/chi/ron button rows (distinguished by whether button-label strings show up in parent AtkValues). After a successful riichi-confirm the novice client shows a yaku-preview popup that shares the same detection signature — the loop now dispatches a tsumogiri discard to complete the declaration instead of re-clicking the already-committed list.
